column1: Event Set up Instructions for EXternal Teams

Details: A hands-on 2 hour workshop where kids learn to catch food lies, just like real FBI agents catch crime. 4 levels of food label reading and 2 missions to apply what they’ve learned. By the end, they walk out as certified FBI agents. With the tools to question what they're eating. And outsmart the marketers who've been banking on them not to.
